summary.en: Oman projects may specify IEC 62196 connector families, including Type 2 for AC charging or CCS Combo 2 for DC charging, through utility requirements, procurement documents, site engineering, fleet requirements, or charging-network interoperability rules. A single mandatory national public-charger connector rule should not be assumed unless a binding Oman instrument or project document says so.
summary.zh: 阿曼项目可能通过公用事业要求、采购文件、现场工程、车队要求或充电网络互操作规则指定IEC 62196连接器系列，包括交流Type 2或直流CCS Combo 2。除非阿曼约束性文件或项目文件明确规定，不应假设存在统一强制的全国公共充电连接器规则。
summary.zht: 阿曼項目可能通過公用事業要求、採購文件、現場工程、車隊要求或充電網絡互操作規則指定IEC 62196連接器系列，包括交流Type 2或直流CCS Combo 2。除非阿曼約束性文件或項目文件明確規定，不應假設存在統一強制的全國公共充電連接器規則。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 Type 2 AC connector requirements where specified
IEC 62196-3 CCS Combo 2 DC connector requirements where specified

summary.en: China chargers and vehicles commonly use GB/T 20234 connector interfaces, including GB/T 20234.1-2023 for general requirements, GB/T 20234.2-2015 for AC charging interfaces, and GB/T 20234.3-2023 for DC charging interfaces. GB/T AC and DC interfaces are not automatically interoperable with IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS Combo 2 interfaces, so connector hardware, cable assemblies, communication, locking, labeling, and user instructions may need Oman-specific configuration.
summary.zh: 中国充电桩和车辆通常使用GB/T 20234连接接口，包括连接装置通用要求GB/T 20234.1-2023、交流充电接口GB/T 20234.2-2015和直流充电接口GB/T 20234.3-2023。GB/T交流和直流接口不会自动与IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS Combo 2接口互通，因此连接器硬件、线缆组件、通信、锁止、标识和用户说明可能需要按阿曼项目配置。
summary.zht: 中國充電樁和車輛通常使用GB/T 20234連接接口，包括連接裝置通用要求GB/T 20234.1-2023、交流充電接口GB/T 20234.2-2015和直流充電接口GB/T 20234.3-2023。GB/T交流和直流接口不會自動與IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS Combo 2接口互通，因此連接器硬件、線纜組件、通訊、鎖止、標識和用戶說明可能需要按阿曼項目配置。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 for China DC charging communication

gap.en: Do not rely on a China GB/T plug drawing as proof of IEC 62196 interoperability. Confirm the Oman vehicle population or fleet inlet type, public-network connector rule if any, AC or DC communication route, cable ratings, locking behavior, temperature-rise evidence, labeling, and spare-parts plan before shipment.
gap.zh: 不应将中国GB/T插头图纸作为IEC 62196互操作性的证明。出货前应确认阿曼车辆体系或车队车辆接口类型、是否存在公共网络连接器规则、交流或直流通信路径、线缆额定值、锁止行为、温升证据、标识及备件方案。
gap.zht: 不應將中國GB/T插頭圖紙作為IEC 62196互操作性的證明。出貨前應確認阿曼車輛體系或車隊車輛接口類型、是否存在公共網絡連接器規則、交流或直流通訊路徑、線纜額定值、鎖止行為、溫升證據、標識及備件方案。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary or project-specific unless mandated by Oman regulation, tender, concession, public-network rule, fleet contract, utility condition, or another binding instrument
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T connector configuration is commonly expected for China-market equipment and infrastructure; mandatory status depends on the applicable Chinese product, procurement, or project route

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T 20234.1-2023, GB/T 20234.2-2015, GB/T 20234.3-2023, and IEC 62196 connector evidence should be treated as different interface-family evidence unless the exact Oman project documents accept the China connector configuration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 除非阿曼项目文件明确接受中国连接器配置，否则应将GB/T 20234.1-2023、GB/T 20234.2-2015、GB/T 20234.3-2023与IEC 62196连接器证据视为不同接口体系证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 除非阿曼項目文件明確接受中國連接器配置，否則應將GB/T 20234.1-2023、GB/T 20234.2-2015、GB/T 20234.3-2023與IEC 62196連接器證據視為不同接口體系證據。
